title: Job Opening Teacher at Don Bosco Tech

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at Don Bosco Tech
jsonLd.description:
Join the Don Bosco Tech family as a Teacher in Bhubaneswar. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Don Bosco Tech:
Don Bosco Tech is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Don Bosco Tech!
